name: Boeing Blue (Starliner IVA)
description: Lightweight launch-entry pressure suit built by David Clark Company for Boeing's CST-100 Starliner commercial-crew vehicle. Touch-screen-compatible gloves, integrated communications cap, vented helmet. Debuted on the Crew Flight Test mission flown by Butch Wilmore and Suni Williams (June–September 2024).
best_known_for: Boeing's blue IVA suit for the CST-100 Starliner, debuted on the Crew Flight Test 2024
